hero.title: Build a career in medical technology that matters.
hero.description:
PEIC is an engineering-led manufacturer and medical technology integration partner with institutional relationships across India. 
We hire for technical precision, accountability, and long-term commitment.

benefits.title: Technical Development
benefits.description: Defined career pathways with exposure across manufacturing, biomedical service, quality, and commercial functions.

benefits.title: Healthcare Coverage
benefits.description: Medical benefits as per applicable employment policy.

benefits.title: Cross-Functional Teams
benefits.description: Manufacturing, biomedical engineering, service, and commercial teams working across PEIC's Mumbai facility cluster.

benefits.title: Competitive Compensation
benefits.description: Market-aligned packages with the stability of an organization operating continuously since 1968.

culture.title: How We Work
culture.subtitle: Technical depth. Institutional accountability. Long-term relationships.

open_application.title: Don't see the right role?
open_application.description: PEIC maintains a talent pipeline for biomedical engineers, service technicians, quality professionals, and institutional sales talent.

general_email_note: Or email your resume directly to careers@peic.in
